name: Delaware DFM Asbestos Abatement Contractors

agency.name: Delaware Division of Facilities Management Asbestos Office

updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the DFM Asbestos Office and Delaware Open Data portal before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: Delaware Class A asbestos abatement contractor credentials
Delaware Class B asbestos abatement contractor credentials
Professional service firm asbestos credentials where applicable
Certified Asbestos Vendors open-data records where reviewed
knownExclusions: This entry covers asbestos abatement credentials only; general contractor registration, electrical, plumbing/HVACR, local permits, and business licenses are separate sources.
Open-data vendor records and DFM certification requirements must be reconciled before any adapter is promoted.
Project notifications, inspections, disposal requirements, and federal or DNREC obligations are outside this source entry.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Use official DFM and Delaware Open Data pages manually until the current export shape, field meanings, and redistribution position are reviewed.
publicRecordsNotes: Official asbestos credential metadata only. Absence from one DFM or open-data page is not proof that no asbestos authorization exists.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: Delaware Open Data exposes a Certified Asbestos Vendors dataset page, but no OpenTrade adapter has reviewed the current Socrata export shape, terms, privacy fields, or completeness against DFM licensing requirements.
researchNotes: DFM Asbestos Office requirements identify Class A and Class B contractor applications and annual review/approval. The open-data vendor page may become a future adapter candidate after field-shape and terms review.
verificationCaveats: Preserve the asbestos credential class and source page when verifying records.
No match means no matching asbestos vendor or credential record was found in this source at the checked time, not that no authorization exists elsewhere.
verificationNotes: No supported adapter is exposed while the DFM and open-data source relationship has not been reviewed for stable machine ingestion.
maintainerNotes: Review the Delaware Open Data Socrata API and DFM asbestos requirements together before considering an adapter.

researchEvidence.note: Official DFM requirements page states Class A Contractor, Class B Contractor, and Professional Service Firm applications are submitted annually for review and approval by the State of Delaware Asbestos Office.
Official Delaware Open Data page identifies Certified Asbestos Vendors as a public licenses-and-certifications dataset.
Delaware.gov privacy and terms material reviewed; redistribution rights for normalized registry datasets remain unconfirmed.

blocker.summary: The DFM asbestos licensing path and open-data vendor dataset have not been adapter-reviewed for stable field shape, completeness, privacy, and redistribution terms.
